FROM

(
 select FLEX_VALUE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES_PR
 minus
 select FLEX_VALUE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES_PR
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.FLEX_VALUE_ID = STG_CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES_PR.FLEX_VALUE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES_PR.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_FND_FLEX_VALUES)
